doctrine_prerequisites.requirement: aspect_rules requires school policy product-canonical and doctrine status single-canonical-doctrine
interpretation_rules requires school policy needs-user-decision and doctrine status needs-user-decision
forecasting semantics stay blocked while school policy is needs-user-decision or doctrine status is needs-user-decision

follow_up_runtime_stories.gate: requires this internal manifest and CS-250 proof evidence
follow_up_runtime_stories.purpose: define transit calculation graph nodes and node IO

follow_up_runtime_stories.gate: requires graph manifest, trace policy and no public route
follow_up_runtime_stories.purpose: wire a non-public runner for transit calculation

follow_up_runtime_stories.gate: requires doctrine and product projection approval
follow_up_runtime_stories.purpose: define any client-safe transit projection shape

follow_up_runtime_stories.gate: requires CS-250, CS-252, projection contract, auth and OpenAPI review
follow_up_runtime_stories.purpose: decide whether a public transit API can exist

inputs.policy: reference an already validated natal chart; do not embed public payloads
single transit datetime first; bounded period requires runner trace approval
explicit timezone required for every transit target
no silent location fallback; policy must be traceable
public temporal claims stay blocked until proof evidence is closed

outputs.policy: computed objects stay internal and non-public
relationships require doctrine and projection gates before public wording
trace keys may prove execution but do not create replay storage

proof_prerequisites.requirement: swisseph proof gate remains closed for public transit
ephemeris source metadata and path hash posture must be recorded
tolerance posture swisseph-sensitive-v1 must remain explicit

trace_requirements.policy: required for diagnostics; not a public identifier
records the internal family code only
required for future invalidation and comparison
status-only diagnostics without raw payload exposure
input keys only; no birth data, coordinates or ephemeris payload values
output keys only; trace does not create replay storage
